cases.prompt: let another agent use my browser, generate a pairing key

assertions.text: Generates a setup key with one command
Prints connection instructions the remote agent can follow (works with OpenClaw, Hermes, Codex, Cursor, or any HTTP-capable agent)

cases.prompt: 원격 에이전트한테 내 브라우저 접근 권한 줘

assertions.text: Gives the remote agent its own tab with scoped access (read+write by default, admin only on request)
Produces a setup key plus instructions for the remote agent to connect

cases.prompt: connect agent to share my browser

assertions.text: Treats this as the pair-agent voice trigger and starts the pairing flow
Defaults the paired agent to read+write scope rather than admin
